name: AQUABOUNTY TECHNOLOGIES INC
business: AquaBounty historically developed genetically engineered Atlantic salmon and operated recirculating aquaculture system (RAS) farms. As of the filing, the company has sold its operating farms and intellectual property, and its primary remaining asset is the Ohio Farm Project, consisting of land and construction in process, which is being marketed for sale.

exposures.sentence: Our primary remaining asset is our investment in the Ohio Farm Project, consisting of the remaining Ohio Equipment Assets and the land and construction in process (the Ohio Farm Site).

tamClaims.claim: Aquaculture was a $296 billion industry in 2022, with salmon farming accounting for $22 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations ( FAO ), aquaculture was a $296 billion industry in 2022, with salmon farming accounting for $22 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Global population is projected to reach 9.7 billion people by 2050.
tamClaims.sentence: According to FAO, global population is projected to reach 9.7 billion people by 2050, or roughly 20% growth over the next 24 years.

tamClaims.claim: Aquaculture fish production was 94 million metric tons in 2022, accounting for 51% of global fish production.
tamClaims.sentence: In contrast, over the same period, aquaculture fish production has grown from 14 million metric tons to a level of 94 million metric tons in 2022 and now accounts for 51% of global fish production.

tamClaims.claim: Aquaculture production will need to nearly double by 2050 to meet demand.
tamClaims.sentence: Feeding the growing population and meeting the demand for fish protein will require aquaculture production to nearly double by 2050.
